justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.x and Java to 21, and fixes deprecated properties (spring.datasource.schema -> spring.sql.init.schema-locations). However, it only touches configuration files and imports; no Java source code is migrated to use Java 21 idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, switch expressions), so idiomatic_java21 is limited. The removal of junit-vintage-engine and addition of junit-jupiter is appropriate for Spring Boot 3. The diff is clean and focused with no spurious churn.
